cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So the question is: Today is the second day of the third month of 1966. What is the date a month ago in MM/DD/YYYY? First, I need to understand what "the second day of the third month" means. Well, the third month is March, right? So the first month is January, second is February, third is March. So the second day of March would be March 2, 1966. So today is March 2, 1966. Now the question is asking what the date was a month ago. So a month before March 2, 1966 would be February 2, 1966, right? Because if you subtract one month from March 2, you get February 2. But wait, I should check
